# Antariya

> Antariya is a premium Indian contemporary fashion label blending streetwear edge with luxury embroidery craft.

## About

Antariya designs and sells premium embroidered apparel — tees, hoodies, and accessories — that fuse traditional Indian craft with modern streetwear aesthetics. Based in India, shipping nationwide.

## Pages

- [Home](https://antariyaofficial.com/)
- [Our Story](https://antariyaofficial.com/story)
- [Products](https://antariyaofficial.com/products)
- [Contact](https://antariyaofficial.com/contact)
- [Wishlist](https://antariyaofficial.com/wishlist)
- [Cart](https://antariyaofficial.com/cart)

## API

The API is private and not intended for external consumption.
